name: Divinity Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, corn syrup, and water in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture forms a small ball when dropped into cold water.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Slowly pour the hot syrup through a fine mesh strainer into the beaten egg whites while continuously beating to combine.
6. Stir in the vanilla extract.
7. Fold in the chopped nuts.
8. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper or a parchment-lined baking sheet.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
